mission.title: litellm: [Bug]: VertexAI Anthropic passthrough fails with prompt-caching-scope-2026-01-05 beta header
mission.description: [Bug]: VertexAI Anthropic passthrough fails with prompt-caching-scope-2026-01-05 beta header. This issue affects 16+ users.

steps.title: Identify litellm troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your litellm deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review litellm configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant litellm configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
kubectl get configmap -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=litellm
```
When using Claude Code v2.1.23 through LiteLLM proxy to VertexAI, requests fail because the `anthropic-beta` header contains a value that VertexAI does not support.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Bug]: VertexAI Anthropic passthrough fails with…
steps.description:

## CI (LiteLLM team)

>

>
> - 50-55 passing tests: main is stable with minor issues.
> - 45-49 passing tests: acceptable but needs attention
> - <= 40 passing tests:
```yaml
API Error: 400
{"type":"error","error":{"type":"invalid_request_error","message":"Unexpected value(s) `prompt-caching-scope-2026-01-05` for the `anthropic-beta` header. Please consult our documentation at docs.anthropic.com or try again without the header."}}
```

steps.title: Confirm [Bug]: VertexAI Anthropic passthrough fails with… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n litellm --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.
